title: Remap GraphClient to the tokensave 6.1.1 tool catalog + verify onboard end-to-end
description: Replace the stale TOOL map (client.ts:31-38) and result narrowing in GraphClient so all six methods call real tokensave 6.1.1 tools with verified params and result-shape adapters, while keeping each method's external GraphResult<T> contract stable. search→a real search/context tool; query's callers_of/callees_of/imports_of/tests_for → tokensave_callers/tokensave_callees/tokensave_file_dependents/tokensave_test_map; impact→tokensave_impact; reviewContext→tokensave_context; overview→tokensave_module_api; changes→tokensave_changelog (or the verified equivalent). Add result adapters that map 6.1.1 JSON into SearchHit/NodeRef/ImpactReport so the sandbox post-filter and onboard's existing SearchHit mapping keep working. Then verify end-to-end: after npm run build, `agent-bober onboard` starts the engine without timeout and writes the 5 markdown files to .bober/onboarding/. Depends on Sprint 1 (the MCP transport).

successCriteria.description: Build + typecheck pass with zero errors (npm run build, npm run typecheck).

client.ts TOOL contains only real tokensave 6.1.1 tool names — grep confirms NONE of: semantic_search_nodes, query_graph, get_impact_radius, get_review_context, get_architecture_overview, detect_changes remain in src/graph/.

Each GraphClient method maps to a tokensave 6.1.1 tool verified against the real serve, with a result adapter so the method returns its existing type: search→SearchHit[]; query(callers_of|callees_of|imports_of|tests_for)→NodeRef[] via the matching tokensave_callers/callees/file_dependents/test_map tool; impact→ImpactReport; reviewContext→string; overview→string; changes→NodeRef[]. New collocated tests (execa mocked / fake serve returning 6.1.1-shaped tools/call payloads through the Sprint-1 unwrap) assert search, query (>=1 pattern), and impact return correctly-shaped, sandbox-filtered results.

End-to-end: after `npm run build`, running the built CLI `node dist/cli/index.js onboard` (a) prints 'Starting graph engine...' then proceeds WITHOUT 'handshake timed out', and (b) writes all 5 files — README.md, architecture-overview.md, hotspots.md, knowledge-gaps.md, communities.md — under .bober/onboarding/, updating in place below the generation marker. Evaluator runs this against the real tokensave binary and asserts the 5 files exist and were modified.

GraphClient.search returns SearchHit[] with node.symbol/node.file/node.line populated so onboard.ts's mapping (onboard.ts:137-185) yields non-empty hotspots and module/files sections (the rendered hotspots.md and architecture-overview.md contain at least one real symbol row, not the empty-state text).

Preserved behavior: the sandbox NodeRef.file post-filter (client.ts:249-260), GRAPH_DISABLED / GRAPH_UNAVAILABLE / restarting short-circuits in runWithSandbox (192-202), GraphFallback hints, and the never-throw GraphResult contract are intact. Existing tests/mcp/graph-tools.test.ts (which mocks GraphClient) and other graph tests stay green.

lint passes (zero errors); the diff is confined to the graph layer — src/graph/client.ts (+ src/graph/types.ts only if a result-adapter type is needed) and new/updated tests (tests/graph/client*.test.ts); GraphClient public method signatures are unchanged; onboard.ts is NOT modified (scope: keep its semantic-search path).

nonGoals: Do NOT rework onboard.ts to use tokensave_hotspots/dead_code/circular/module_api directly — onboard keeps its search()-based path (explicit scope decision).
Do NOT change the MCP transport (Sprint 1 owns mcp-client.ts).
Do NOT change GraphClient public method signatures or the GraphResult shape.
Do NOT touch the circuit breaker, pipeline-lifecycle.ts, or branch/sync tooling.
Do NOT add new GraphClient methods or new tokensave tools.
stopConditions: GraphClient calls only real 6.1.1 tools with working adapters, `agent-bober onboard` writes 5 real-content files via the live engine, GraphClient's external contract + sandbox/fallback behavior are preserved, and build/typecheck/test/lint are green
definitionOfDone: client.ts TOOL is the real 6.1.1 catalog; every GraphClient method has a verified tool mapping + result adapter returning its existing type; the sandbox/fallback/disabled short-circuits are intact; new client tests cover search/query/impact over fake 6.1.1 payloads; `node dist/cli/index.js onboard` (after build) starts the engine with no timeout and writes 5 non-empty files to .bober/onboarding/; build/typecheck/test/lint green; diff limited to src/graph/client.ts (+types.ts if needed) and tests.
assumptions: TOOL map (client.ts:31-38) is the only place tool names are defined; methods reference TOOL.search/query/impact/reviewContext/overview/changes (lines 77-115). Replacing the map + the per-method narrow callbacks (runWithSandbox/runRaw, 187-227) is sufficient; the call site `this.mcpClient.call<unknown>(tool, params)` (208) is unchanged because Sprint 1 made call() return the unwrapped tool payload.

query() (84-88) currently passes {pattern, target} to a single tool. 6.1.1 has no single query_graph; map by pattern to distinct tools: callers_of→tokensave_callers, callees_of→tokensave_callees, imports_of→tokensave_file_dependents, tests_for→tokensave_test_map. Implement a small switch inside query() that picks the tool + builds that tool's params (e.g. a symbol/qualified-name or file path from NodeRef), then narrows the tool's result to NodeRef[]. Confirm each tool's exact param + result JSON by probing the real serve.

overview() (107-109) returns GraphResult<string>; tokensave_module_api needs a path arg — pass 'src' (or projectRoot). Adapt its JSON ({symbols:[...]}) into a string summary, OR return the JSON-stringified payload; onboard does not call overview() so the only constraint is the existing string return type and any mcp-tools caller. reviewContext()→tokensave_context (NL/context) returning text. changes()→tokensave_changelog (verify) returning entries adapted to NodeRef[].

search() (77-82) is the onboard-critical method. Map to the 6.1.1 tool whose output best fills SearchHit{node:{symbol,file,line,kind}, score, snippet}. tokensave_search (by-name) and tokensave_context (semantic) are both candidates — probe both; pick the one that yields per-symbol rows with file+line, and write an adapter from its JSON to SearchHit[]. The {limit, kind} opts map to the tool's limit (+ post-filter by kind if the tool lacks it).

SearchHit/NodeRef/ImpactReport live in src/graph/types.ts; if a 6.1.1 field name differs (e.g. tool returns name/path/line vs symbol/file/line), do the renaming inside the client.ts adapter so types.ts and callers stay stable. Only add to types.ts if a new internal adapter type is genuinely needed.

End-to-end onboard verification updates the EXISTING .bober/onboarding/*.md files in place — they already contain the generation marker '<!-- generated by agent-bober — DO NOT EDIT below this line -->', so OnboardingComposer.writeAll preserves content above the marker and replaces below (no refuse-to-clobber). This is expected.

onboard.ts treats GraphResult.ok=false as empty sections (onboard.ts:137-185), so a partially-mapped catalog still produces files; sc-2-5 requires at least hotspots + module/files (both via search()) to be non-empty, which only needs search() fully working.
generatorNotes:
PREREQUISITE: Sprint 1 merged (call() returns the unwrapped tools/call payload; handshake works). Read FIRST: src/graph/client.ts in full (TOOL 31-38, the 6 methods 77-115, runWithSandbox/runRaw 187-227, keepNode sandbox 249-260), src/graph/types.ts (SearchHit, NodeRef, ImpactReport, GraphResult), src/cli/commands/onboard.ts (119-185 — how SearchHit is consumed), tests/mcp/graph-tools.test.ts (the GraphClient mock contract).

PROBE the real serve for EXACT params + result JSON of every tool you map (drive initialize → notifications/initialized → tools/call as in Sprint 1's probe; or just inspect via the live tokensave MCP tools). Capture the shape of: tokensave_search, tokensave_context, tokensave_callers, tokensave_callees, tokensave_file_dependents, tokensave_test_map, tokensave_impact, tokensave_module_api, tokensave_changelog. Write the adapter from each tool's JSON → the GraphClient internal type.

STEP 1: rewrite TOOL with the verified 6.1.1 names (search/impact/reviewContext/overview/changes). Update each method's narrow callback to adapt the new payload to its return type and keep the keepNode sandbox filter. STEP 2: implement query() pattern→tool switch (callers/callees/file_dependents/test_map) building each tool's params from the NodeRef and adapting results to NodeRef[]. STEP 3: add tests/graph/client.test.ts using execa-mocked fake serve responses shaped like real tools/call content payloads, asserting search→SearchHit[], query(callers_of)→NodeRef[], impact→ImpactReport, plus a sandbox-drop case (out-of-root file filtered). STEP 4 verify E2E: `npm run build` then `node dist/cli/index.js onboard`; confirm no 'handshake timed out', 5 files written, hotspots.md + architecture-overview.md contain real symbol rows. Keep onboard.ts unchanged. Commit `bober(sprint-2): remap GraphClient to tokensave 6.1.1 tool catalog + onboard E2E`.
evaluatorNotes: sc-2-2: grep -rn 'semantic_search_nodes\|query_graph\|get_impact_radius\|get_review_context\|get_architecture_overview\|detect_changes' src/graph/ → zero hits. sc-2-3: read client.ts — every TOOL value is a tokensave_* name; query() switches per pattern; each method has an adapter. Run the new client tests (execa mocked) — search/query/impact return correctly-shaped + sandbox-filtered results. sc-2-4 (key): with real tokensave present, `npm run build` then `node dist/cli/index.js onboard`; assert exit 0, stdout has no 'handshake timed out', and all 5 .bober/onboarding/*.md exist with mtime newer than the run start; if tokensave is ABSENT, treat sc-2-4 as skipped (document it) — do not hard-fail the sprint on a missing binary. sc-2-5: open hotspots.md + architecture-overview.md — at least one real symbol row (not the 'No hotspots' / 'No modules' empty text). sc-2-6: tests/mcp/graph-tools.test.ts and other graph tests green; sandbox drop still filters out-of-root files. sc-2-7: lint clean; `git status --porcelain` shows only src/graph/client.ts (+ maybe types.ts) and tests; onboard.ts NOT in the diff; GraphClient signatures unchanged. Full suite: no NEW failures beyond known unrelated ones.
